summary: A web-based Doom-style Battle Royale game with kill and revive mechanics
architectural_notes: Web-based game for browser compatibility (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
Must work on both mobile and desktop devices
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Retro sci-fi corridor texture with industrial pipes and panels for game walls (wall-texture.dim_512x512.png)
- Dark metallic floor texture with grated metal pattern (floor-texture.dim_512x512.png)
- Neon red crosshair reticle for weapon aiming (crosshair.dim_64x64.png)
- Stylized weapon icon showing futuristic gun for UI (weapon-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Health bar background with damaged metal effect (health-bg.dim_256x64.png)
- Doom-style logo with aggressive angular letters and red glow effect (logo.dim_400x150.png)

existing_features.title: Create a 3D first-person shooter game environment using Three.js with React Three Fiber that resembles classic Doom aesthetics (retro sci-fi corridors, industrial textures, dark atmospheric lighting)
Implement player combat mechanics with shooting functionality that allows players to eliminate opponents
Implement revive/respawn system that allows eliminated players to return to the game
Create battle royale game loop with match start, player elimination tracking, and victory conditions

Design a dark, industrial visual theme with neon accent colors (red, orange, green) reminiscent of classic Doom, using bold typography and atmospheric lighting effects throughout the UI and game environment

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement player state management on backend to track health, position, eliminations, and match status
